programme.title: Home & Garden
programme.desc: BBC Home & Garden provides home renovation shows, interior design makeovers, and garden transformation programming. It features British lifestyle content focused on property upgrades, DIY projects, and creative home improvement ideas.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Mike wanted a house his sons would be proud of, but a builder left him out of pocket.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and a team of experts help to salvage people's homes

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
